title: Australian Poke
description: A fusion dish combining the flavors of Australia and Hawaii, with grilled fish marinated in a zesty sauce.
instructions: 1. In a blender or food processor, combine soy sauce, honey, garlic, and ginger. Blend until smooth.
2. Cut the poke fish into thin slices.
3. In a shallow dish, whisk together the blended sauce and melted butter.
4. Add the fish slices to the marinade and toss to coat.
5. Heat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
6. Remove the fish from the marinade and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
7. Meanwhile, mix the red onion and mint leaves in a separate bowl.
8. To serve, place a slice of cooked fish on a plate and top with a spoonful of the onion-mint mixture and a sprinkle of parmesan cheese.
